summary: The autonomous prompt is coherent with the authoritative run sheet: one ignored feat/aws-ecs-program worktree, serialized mutations, truthful program-branch slice anchors, one frozen Plan 12 candidate, exact-SHA hosted CI, and one final fast-forward into release/0.7.1 before GO and lifecycle closure.

review_basis.head: b50b5da62a2fee91128e9993df0828f50feaf8fc
review_basis.process: Independent xhigh orchestration review using plan-review, documentation-testing, security/release, worktree, and verification guidance. The full five-source result, AWS plan-folder orchestration references, live Filigree DAG, workflow triggers, shell fences, links, JSON, whitespace, stale terms, and source hashes were checked after repairs.

warnings.detail: Later stages still require named operator authority, Docker, GitHub CI, AWS infrastructure and credentials, protected evidence storage, and cleanup capacity. Missing authority or facilities remain explicit blockers.

Approval authorizes orchestration, not AWS runtime or artifact publication. Only Plan 12 may issue runtime GO for the exact tested source SHA, digest, and platform after cleanup and the final fast-forward.

resolved_findings.resolution: The prompt now requires one program worktree and branch, removes per-slice integration branches, and serializes shared-worktree mutations.
The complete unfiltered suite is held until final washup and explicitly includes uv run pytest tests/ -v -m "" on one unchanged candidate.
Skills and subagents are discretionary, coordinator effort is xhigh, agents default high with xhigh escalation, and unsupported effort controls do not block execution.
Plan 06 now starts from the current program tip containing Plans 02 and 08A; no per-slice rebase instruction remains.

verification: all five source files have balanced Markdown fences
all 56 Bash or shell fences pass bash -n
all 25 existing local links resolve; three Plan 10 forward-link examples are intentionally created during implementation
git diff --check passes for tracked changes and the untracked prompt
live Filigree milestone has exactly 20 expected steps with exact direct dependencies and the documented nine-node critical path
ci.yaml, codeql.yaml, and enforce-allowlist-judge-gates.yaml accept the immutable RC* push ref used by Plan 12
targeted stale orchestration-term searches found no executable per-slice worktree, branch, rebase, early-release, or omitted-full-suite instruction in the five reviewed sources
